resources.string: Unexpected error while downloading an image.
New! You\'re in control - choose what info you want to share with apps.
An application requires an update to the Android Wear app.
This app won\'t run unless you update the Android Wear app.
This app won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
This app won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your phone.
This app won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your tablet.
The specified account does not exist on this device. Please choose a different account.
An application requires Google Play services to be enabled.
A data connection is required to connect to Google Play services.
An application requires installation of Google Play services.
An application requires an update for Google Play services.
Error signing in the specified account. Please choose a different account.
Unknown issue with Google Play services.
Google Play services, which some of your applications rely on, is not supported by your device. Please contact the manufacturer for assistance.
This app won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
This app requires one or more Google Play services that are not currently available. Please contact the developer for assistance.
This feature isn\'t available because your organization has enabled sharing restrictions
Do you want to delete this collaborator ?
Do you want to delete this invitation ?
Do you want to leave this folder ?
Could Not Complete the Accept Process
has invited you to the shared folder
Could Not Complete the Reject Process
You don\'t have any Mobile Creations yet
Error:- Target and source location for copy operation are same
Error:- Target and source location for move operation are same
Select the location where your assets, mobile creations and Libraries are stored.
Do you want to archive this item ?
Do you want to archive this file ?
Do you want to archive this folder ?
Do you want to archive these %d items ?
Do you want to delete this file ?
Do you want to delete this folder ?
Do you want to delete these %d items ?
Do you want to unfollow this library?
Do you want to delete this library ?
Do you want to delete this item ?
No messages yet, start the conversation!
Do you want to delete this file ?
Unable to connect to the Creative Cloud.\n Please check your internet connection and try again
The Creative Cloud service you have attempted to access is unavailable.\n Please check your VPN connection and try again
The Creative Cloud service you have attempted to access is unavailable.\n Please try again
Add comments to your work or collaborate with your team.
Click on the options button to reveal renaming, moving, and deleting
Invite your team to collaborate on this folder (library)
Mark with our drawing tools, or add notes and arrows to your screenshots.
All your screenshots are automatically uploaded in this folder.
An error occurred while authenticating.\nPlease try again later.
You don\'t have any Compositions yet
This Creative Cloud Library is empty
Message about the user not being entitled to to preview the video.
Full access to Adobe ID account
Only one Adobe ID is supported
Your clientID is not compatible with this version of the Creative SDK. Please re-register your app for a new API Key.
Do you want to leave this folder ?
Do you want to leave this library ?
Looks like Library is not yet synced for collaboration
You don\'t have any Drawings yet
You don\'t have any Libraries yet
%1$s updated your role from %2$s to %3$s on folder \"%4$s\"
%1$s updated your role from %2$s to %3$s on library \"%4$s\"
invited you to the shared folder \"%1$s\"
invited you to the shared library \"%1$s\"
Preview not available, nothing to share
You don\'t have any Photos yet
Delivering the power of Adobe Photoshop with the convenience of mobile, Photoshop Mix offers creative, simple, fun photo editing on Android.
Do you want to remove this collaborator ?
Currently there are no assets to show.
Do you want to revoke this invitation ?
You don\'t have any Sketches yet
You don\'t have any Files yet
Not enough free space to download %s
Downloading of %s failed due to IO error
The server http://%s requires a username and password. The server says : %s
You do not have permission to create public link
Please grant Storage and Camera permission to continue.
Please grant Camera permission to continue.
Please grant Storage permission to continue.
Tags must contain only alphanumeric characters with or without spaces
Problem starting service. Please try again later.
Get started using the options below
Your code is invalid. Please try again.
Enter a title for your work in progress
Problem launching camera to capture picture. Please try again later.
There was a problem connecting. Please check your network connection and try again.
Problem loading Account settings from server
Problem saving Account settings on server
Your assets are being downloaded from Creative Cloud. Are you sure you would like to cancel?
Problem downloading file %1$s. Please try again later.
Problem loading Accounts. Please try again later.
There was a problem connecting. Please check your network connection and try again.
Could not find a player that can play this video on your device
Project will be saved as draft
First and last name is required
Profile details are saved, but there was a problem saving profile image. Please try again later.
Problem saving profile details. Please try again later.
Problem loading profile details. Please try again later.
All changes will be lost, are you sure you want to quit?
You can use Behance to publish work as part of \na team, but will lose access to your portfolio \nif you leave your organization
You are currently signed\nin with an Enterprise ID
You need to have a verified email address to access this feature.
Problem loading image. Please try later.
Failed to crop image, please try again.
Image not found, please try again.
%1$s Album is empty. Please try different album.
Problem loading Albums. Please try again later.
Selected image dimensions don\'t match requirements
Image must be at least %1$s x %2$s. Selected image is %3$s x %4$s
Image must not be more than %1$s x %2$s. Selected image is %3$s x %4$s
%1$s is an invalid file type. Only %2$s are allowed.
%1$s is an invalid file type. %2$s are not allowed.
Selected image doesn\'t match size requirements
Image is too small. Minimum file size is %1$s
Image is too large. Maximum file size is %1$s
No use is allowed without explicit permission from owner
Failed to load location data. Please try again later.
Log In to Behance to comment on \n%1$s\'s Work
Log In to Behance to follow \n%1$s\'s Work
You currently have Safe Browsing turned on. Would you like to turn off Safe Browsing to view projects on Behance that contain adult content?
Log In to Behance to View projects containing adult content.
Because you are under 18 years old, you can\'t access adult content on Behance.
Problem deleting comment. Please try later.
There was a problem connecting. Please check your network connection and try again.
Problem posting comment. Please try later.
Would you like to allow commercial use of your work?
Would you like to allow others to share adaptations of your work?
Would you like to allow others to share your work as long as they give you credit?
Would you like to require that shared adaptations contain a license no more restrictive than your own?
This project has changes which have not been saved. You can save a draft to work on later, discard all changes, or continue creating.
Clipboard does not contain valid embed
Image is not large enough to display full width
Add content to your project\n using the tools below
This module is not currently supported in the Android project editor. We\'re hard at work building support, in the meantime you can edit the rest of the project leaving this module unharmed.
Your video has been uploaded successfully, and is being converted into a web-friendly format. This process can take anywhere from a few minutes, up to several hours, depending on the file size.
%1$s is an invalid file type. Only %2$s are allowed.
%1$s doesn\'t match size requirements. Maximum file size is %2$s.
Cannot upload project. %1$s. Please check your network connection and try again.
Error publishing your project on Behance
Upload will resume once internet connection is regained
Check out new project on my @Behance portfolio: %1$s
Tap to view your published project
View your published project on Behance
Your project cannot be uploaded at this time. Please check your network connection and try again.
Visit Behance to view feedback on your work\n and share on Twitter, Facebook, and more.
Problem loading image to publish. Please check and try again.
Cannot upload work in progress. %1$s. Please check your network connection and try again.
Error publishing your work in progress on Behance
Check out new work on my @Behance portfolio: %1$s
Tap to view your published work in progress
View your published work in progress on Behance
Published your work in progress on Behance
Your work in progress cannot be uploaded at this time. Please check your network connection and try again.
Please make sure that you have the app installed and configured.
I thought you would find this collection interesting: %1$s
I thought you would find this gallery interesting: %1$s
I thought you would find this picture interesting: %1$s
I thought you would find this project interesting: %1$s
I thought you would find %1$s\'s portfolio interesting: %2$s
I thought you would find %1$s\'s profile interesting: %2$s
Please Login To Facebook to proceed.
Error authenticating with Facebook. Please try again later.
Insufficent permissions to share on Facebook.
Error Authenticating with Twitter. Please try again later.
Please Login To Twitter to proceed.
Are your sure you want to unlink Facebook account?
Are your sure you want to unlink Twitter account?
Publishing your work in progress. Check status bar for progress.
Tags must contain only alphanumeric characters with or without spaces
Problem starting service. Please try again later.
Your Facebook password has changed. Please log into this app again to reconnect your Facebook account.
This app doesn’t have permission to do this. To change permissions, try logging into the app again.
Please log into this app again to reconnect your Facebook account.
Please log into this app again to reconnect your Facebook account.
Your Facebook account is locked. Please log into www.facebook.com to continue.
When this is on, Clip will lower the soundtrack volume when there is audio (people talking, sound fx) present in your videos.
Clip generates a great video for you, edited to the beats of your soundtrack. You customize the pace, music and order.
Your projects automatically sync to\nyour Creative Cloud account and will\nbe available across all your devices.
Trim clips. Add Looks and titles. Adjust volume. More custom control.
Use Mobile Data For Media Sync
Could not access camera. Please enable camera access in Settings->Apps->Adobe Clip->Permissions.
There are ongoing downloads from Creative Cloud which will be cancelled. Are you sure you want to close the project?
Sorry, some media failed to import. Files larger than 5 GB are not supported.
There is not enough space on your device. Free some space and try again.
%1$d succeeded, %2$d failed.\nPlease check your internet connection and try again.
Error occurred while downloading asset from Creative Cloud.
Error in saving video! Please try again after some time.
View your published video and share on \nFacebook, Twitter and more.
Tap the icons to adjust the soundtrack, pace, or clip order.
Hold and drag clips to reorder. Tap + to add more.
Tap here to make more custom edits in freeform mode, or share your video.
Tap the icons to adjust the soundtrack, pace, or clip order.
Tap the filmstrip to make more custom edits, or the arrow to share your video.
Hold and drag clips to reorder. Tap + to add more.
Tap these icons to adjust exposure & volume, split & duplicate clip, and more.
Tap the audio track icon to edit the soundtrack, the looks icon to add a look, or the gear icon to make other project adjustments.
Tap here to add photos and videos to your project.
Tap clips to select them. Hold and drag to reorder. Tap + to add more.
Tap here to share your video or send it to Premiere Pro for more editing.
Drag the purple handles to adjust clip duration. Dots indicate soundtrack beats.
Drag the purple handles to adjust clip duration.
Drag with two fingers to move both trim handles together, keeping the same duration.
Swipe left or right to view your projects, Clip community videos, and your published videos.
Tap here to create a new project.
Looks like we crashed! Please help us fix the problem by sending a crash report.
Could not access contacts. Please enable contacts access in Settings->Apps->Adobe Clip->Permissions.
Please connect to a Wi-Fi or Mobile Data network.
Please connect to a Wi-Fi network or turn Mobile Data sync on (Settings > My Account).
Are you sure you want to delete the selected clip from this project?
Remove the project from all your devices and Creative Cloud?
All shared links to this video will stop working. This can\'t be undone.

Create beautiful videos right on your smartphone with Adobe Premiere Clip, the perfect tool for on-the-go video editing. Choose a soundtrack and select the pace – Clip will automatically create a video synced to the beat of your music. For more customization, you have powerful editing features at your fingertips such as trimming, applying custom Looks, smart audio effects and more. Share directly to Twitter, Facebook or Youtube, or take your project further in Premiere Pro CC, the industry-standard professional editing tool.
Append a short video bumper for Adobe Premiere Clip to the end of published videos.
Collect looks in this library\nto use them across other\nmobile and desktop apps.
Please enable Storage and Contacts access in Settings->Apps->Adobe Clip->Permissions
Some error happened while downloading the media. Please try again.
The media in your project is currently syncing to Creative Cloud so that you can open your project in Premiere Pro. Once the sync is complete, re-tap Edit in Premiere Pro.
Please try again in a few minutes
Could not access gallery. Please enable gallery access in Settings->Apps->Adobe Clip->Permissions
Feedback for Adobe Premiere Clip version %1$s
Some of the project media is in a format not supported on this device.
The file size exceeds the maximum limit of 5.0 GB
This device does not support export at resolution higher than 720p

© 2018 Adobe Systems Incorporated and its licensors. All rights reserved. Adobe, the Adobe logo, and the Creative Cloud are either registered trademarks or trademarks of Adobe Systems Incorporated in the United States and/or other countries. All other trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
Choose any of your Libraries \nto access your custom looks.
Error occurred while applying the selected look, please use some other look.
There\'s not enough space for your projects on this device. Please free up some space and relaunch the app.
Please sign-in using the same credentials as Lightroom and try again.
The Collection requested could not be found. Please ensure you have access to the specified collection and try again.
Premiere Clip currently supports importing 100 Lightroom photos. Tap the sequence icon and + to add more media.
Your Video Could not be uploaded. Please try later.
You can change the default export resolution in Preferences
Please connect to a Wi-fi network with internet access to export your video this way.
You haven\'t created any projects yet.
You haven\'t shared any videos yet.
You don’t have enough space available in creative cloud. Visit assets.adobe.com to manage your storage.
Create a video with your recent media
Oops! This project has a schema version that is less than the current version, we can\'t open this.
When this is on, Clip will zoom in on photos to give a moving slideshow effect.

Your project and media will show up soon
at assets.adobe.com. In Premiere Pro,
select "Convert Premiere Clip Project" to
continue working on your project.
Looks like something went wrong and we couldnt send you project to the Creative Cloud.\nWe were unable to copy your project to your creative cloud folder.\nPlease check your account and try again.
Problem getting access to your account.
Are you sure you want to reset your branding preferences?
Your Project is now synced to Creative Cloud and ready to be sent to Premiere Pro.
Ready to Send to Premiere Pro
Set this as default export resolution
Would you like to sign-in as a different user

%1$s %2$s has shared the video \"%3$s\" with you! Click the following link to watch this video now: %4$s.\nCreate your own Adobe Premiere Clip video by getting the free app here: http://www.adobe.com/go/premiereclip Share on social: #MadeWithClip
%1$s %2$s has shared an Adobe Premiere Clip video with you!
Getting creative with @PremiereClip! Create your own: bit.ly/premiereclip #MadeWithClip
Unable to Save to Creative Cloud because Adobe Clip was sent to the background
Unable to Save to Gallery because Adobe Clip was sent to the background
Unable to Share to Creative Cloud Video because Adobe Clip was sent to the background
Unable to Share to Twitter because Adobe Clip was sent to the background
Unable to Share to YouTube because Adobe Clip was sent to the background
The published video file size would be more than the Creative Cloud supported limit. Please try sharing at a lower resolution.
The published video file size would be more than the Creative Cloud supported limit. Please reduce the project duration.
Your project failed to upload successfully. Please try again.
Video could not be exported. Try exporting at a lower resolution.
Video could not be exported. Try exporting again.
Publishes a video link that anyone can view. Your work can also be featured in our community gallery!
Only people with the link can view your video.
Video is longer than supported limit for Twitter. If you continue, Adobe Clip will post a link to Creative Cloud Video.
You are about to sign out. Are you sure you want to continue?
If smart volume is on, all the audio in this clip will be increased to a consistent volume.
When this is on, trimming a clip will snap to the beats of the soundtrack.
Enable clip splitting by moving the white playhead line away from the purple trim handles.
Split the clip at the white playhead line. This will create two independent clips.
Turn this image into a storycard, which you can add notes to, shoot against, and replace with footage. Plan before you shoot with sketches, location shots, or cue cards. This can\'t be undone.
You have successfully linked your Dropbox account.
You have successfully linked your Google account.
You have successfully unlinked your Dropbox account.
You have successfully unlinked your Google account.
Premiere Clip makes it fast and fun to create quality videos that can easily be shared. Automatically create a video synced to the beat of your music, or customize it further in the Freeform editor.
Take your project further. When you open your Premiere Clip project in Premiere Pro, all of your edits will appear seamlessly in your timeline.
Add Hollywood quality looks to make your videos shine. Use tools like Smart Volume to make sure your stories sound as clear and loud as possible.
Send your project to the Creative Cloud in one tap. Open in Premiere Pro with an intact timeline and full quality assets.
Publish your finished stories to the world. Promote on YouTube, Facebook, and Twitter.
Please try again in a few minutes.
Are you sure you want to convert this media into a storycard? This can\'t be undone.
Please sign in using a Twitter Account.
Some clips are missing because they were moved or deleted from the device.
The selected file types are not supported for editing in Premiere Clip.
One or more selected file is not supported for editing in Premiere Clip. They will not be added to the project.

To personalize your experience and improve product features, this app sends Adobe information about how you use it. By continuing to use the app, you agree to share this data with Adobe. You can change your preferences in the settings at any time.

Looks like something went wrong and we couldn’t send your project to the Creative Cloud.\nWe were unable to save the project to Creative Cloud account because there is no space remaining.\nPlease clear out some space in your account and try again.
You can change watermark / bumper settings in Preferences

By clicking \'Publish\', you certify that you own all rights to the content or that you are authorized by the owner to make the content publicly available on YouTube, and that it otherwise complies with the YouTube Terms of Service located at .
Your Video could not be uploaded. Please verify your account and try again after sometime
Your Video could not be uploaded due to network error. Please try again after sometime
Please sign in using a Google Account for publishing to YouTube.
Please enter Title and Description for the video.
Made with Adobe Premiere Clip. Make your own clip at https://premiereclip.adobe.com
Are you sure you want to sign out from account ?
Your video could not be published. Adobe Clip needs user permission to publish video to YouTube.
The file size exceeds the maximum limit of
